  - trust-score-required       hook=trust-score-validator                     desc=Check that SO-mode output carries a TRUST_REPORT header

limitations: Does not execute live model tasks.
Does not prove time-to-merge, defect-rate, or cognitive-load wins.
Only proves the local substrate needed before the A/B/C falsification benchmark.

benchmark_plan_available.rationale: Existing so-vs-vanilla benchmark dry-run is available.

cos_projection_exists.rationale: COS repo has inspectable projected substrate.

driver_boundary_visible.rationale: Codex projection does not hide Claude coupling.

manifest_debt_not_hidden.rationale: Remaining manifest debt is visible as warn.

public_claim_gate_clean.rationale: Public high-risk claims remain bounded by a gate.

status_visible.rationale: Status tooling inspects the COS repo without model calls.

vanilla_repo_unchanged.rationale: Baseline repo remains a clean native-harness fixture.
